name: GH_WireType
summary: Enumerates the different kinds of connecting wires.

enum_values.name: dynamic
enum_values.summary: Dynamic indicates the wire is in the process of being made.

enum_values.name: wireless
enum_values.summary: Wireless connector. Will be drawn dotted when either end is selected.

enum_values.name: generic
enum_values.summary: Generic connector wire. Can't go wrong with generic.

enum_values.name: faint
enum_values.summary: Similar to generic, but less pronounced.

enum_values.name: item
enum_values.summary: Wire with a single data transfer.

enum_values.name: list
enum_values.summary: Wire with a single list transfer.

enum_values.name: dynamicAlternative1
enum_values.summary: Wire type used by copyname=true wires.
